title: docs: podman-kube-play(1): tables are discombobulated
body:
Totally weird formatting: field names getting moved into the right-hand column, empty rows, missing fields:
```console
$ make docs
...
$ man docs/build/man/podman-kube-play.1
...
Pod Fields
       ┌───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┐
       │Field                              │ Support                       │
       ├───────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┤
       │containers                         │ ✅                            │
       ├───────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┤
       │initContainers                     │ ✅                            │
       ├───────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┤
       │imagePullSecrets                   │ enableServiceLinks            │
       ├───────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┤
                                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ does not belong here
```
Problem seems to be related to blank values under `Support` (right-hand column), and seems to be a bug in `go-md2man`. 

Workaround: we need to do something to https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/kubernetes_support.md to remove the empty right-hand columns. Maybe add an X? dash? That's not something I can decide.
